context: Reimbursement policy for Desert Bloom Women's Shelter volunteers and event staff submitting out-of-pocket gala and program costs.
policy_name: Desert Bloom Volunteer & Event Staff Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.notes: Receipts must show vendor name, date, and total.
validation_rules.rule: All reimbursements over 25 require a receipt

validation_rules.action: Route to Diana Ochoa for approval
validation_rules.notes: Program Coordinator may pre-approve recurring gala vendors.
validation_rules.rule: Expenses over 500 require Executive Director approval

validation_rules.notes: Cycles run on the 1st and 15th of each month.
validation_rules.rule: Claims older than 30 days are paid on a best-effort basis
